note: Rep-facing consolidation of the M0 tracking checklist. Full granular list available in checklist.json (Full Ops view).

items.title: Signed partner agreement
items.detail: An active, signed agreement in the finance partner portal.

items.title: Signed cash contract
items.detail: A complete, signed cash contract.

items.title: Proof of income (if required)
items.detail: Provide proof of income when the partner requires it.

items.title: ID verification
items.detail: A copy of the customer's driver's license or other acceptable ID.

items.title: Customer validation completed
items.detail: Customer has completed the partner validation call/process.

items.title: Sales rep recheck verification
items.detail: Rep has completed the recheck verification.

items.title: ACH set up
items.detail: Customer has completed the ACH payment setup.

items.title: Language of agreement
items.detail: Confirm the primary language on the agreement (English or Spanish).

items.title: Web portal sign-up (LightReach)
items.detail: Customer has signed up for their LightReach web portal.

items.title: Clear Facts Disclosure (LightReach)
items.detail: Clear Facts Disclosure completed by the customer.

items.title: Deposit confirmed (if required)
items.detail: If a deposit is required, it's collected and the amount is listed accurately.

items.title: Credit pass on file
items.detail: Proof the credit check passed.

items.title: Credit not expiring
items.detail: Confirm enough time remains before credit expires (LightReach 90 days; others 180 days from approval).

items.title: Proof of ownership
items.detail: Recorded deed, or an unrecorded deed / mortgage statement where accepted.

items.title: Title approved in portal
items.detail: For financed deals, the title is approved in the partner portal. If not, the conditions below may apply.

items.title: If owned by a corporation or LLC
items.detail: Provide LLC / corporation documents.

items.title: If exempt property
items.detail: Provide exemption documentation (property that can't be passed by will or claimed by creditors).

items.title: If signed under Power of Attorney
items.detail: Provide a copy of the POA (LightReach does not allow POA).

items.title: If more than 2 people on title
items.detail: Confirm handling for additional title holders.

items.title: If name doesn't match contract
items.detail: Obtain a name amendment signature.

items.title: If address doesn't match contract
items.detail: Obtain an address amendment signature.

items.title: If a certificate of occupancy is required
items.detail: Provide the certificate of occupancy.

items.title: If a Life Estate
items.detail: Provide the Life Estate documents.

items.title: If held in a Trust
items.detail: List the trustee (not the trust) on the contract and provide the Certificate of Trust.

items.title: Confirm property type is eligible
items.detail: Identify the property type on title (or via certificate of occupancy / property card) and confirm it's eligible for the selected partner. Watch-outs with partner-specific rules: manufactured homes, condos, apartments, ADUs, duplex/triplex, townhomes. See the By Partner lens for the full property matrix.

items.title: Recent, legible electric bill
items.detail: A clear, full bill dated within the last 3 months (LightReach: 2 months). Name and service address must match the contract.

items.title: No utility balance issues
items.detail: No past-due balance over the partner limit (LightReach $1,000; IGS $600) and the customer is not on a payment plan.

items.title: Residential meter
items.detail: Meter must be a residential type. If a GLP meter, must prove year-1 savings (Cash/SunLight).

items.title: Municipal utility check
items.detail: If a municipal utility, verify Trinity can work with it (Cash/SunLight).

items.title: If new to the home (no bill yet)
items.detail: Provide the utility welcome letter, a signed load calc, and a Letter of Explanation.

items.title: If usage history is thin or you're building above it
items.detail: Provide a signed load calc and a Letter of Explanation (state load-calc rules vary by months on the bill -- see By State).

items.title: If a low-income discount is on the bill
items.detail: Provide 6 months of bills.

items.title: Confirm installation type
items.detail: Identify the installation type. Standard 10-45 degree roof mount needs no extra approval.

items.title: If roof pitch exceeds 45 degrees
items.detail: Request local ops approval for the steep-pitch install.

items.title: If flat roof
items.detail: Request local ops approval to install a tilt kit.

items.title: If carport, pergola, or overhang
items.detail: Confirm the structure meets partner approval guidelines (LightReach has specific guidelines).

items.title: Electrical photos
items.detail: Meter, electric panel, and generator (if any) photos -- all legible.

items.title: Structural photos
items.detail: Exterior and interior structural photos.

items.title: Design Intent
items.detail: Design Intent provided (signed for Direct).

items.title: OneDraw certified
items.detail: OneDraw is updated to match the Design Intent and partner contract for the correct property.

items.title: Production validation
items.detail: Project shading analysis / production validation provided.

items.title: Change order (if needed)
items.detail: Submit a change order if layout, equipment, sizing, inputs, production, or pricing changed.

items.title: If tree removal is involved
items.detail: Confirm who removes the trees (Trinity or customer -- see By State for where Trinity has vendors), provide clear photos of the trees and their location relative to the house, and a completed Tree Checklist.

items.title: Ground mount package
items.detail: Photos of the ground-mount area/location, the trench path, and confirmation of whether Trinity does the trenching.

items.title: Detached structure package
items.detail: Photos of the detached structure and its location, the trench path, and confirmation of whether Trinity does the trenching.

items.title: If an add-on to an existing system
items.detail: If the original system was installed by another company, provide its equipment info or photos connected to the meter (modules, size, inverter) or the original agreement.

items.title: If Schedule Z (virtual net metering)
items.detail: Identify the meter being interconnected to, provide the electric bill and photos of the meter you're back-feeding, and the percentage of credits shared. (MA and PA only.)

items.title: If Trinity is re-roofing
items.detail: Signed and dated Roof Acknowledgement form, Roof Cash Contract, and Roof Partner Contract (all matching).

items.title: Battery package
items.detail: Signed and dated Battery Acknowledgement form, Battery Cash/Partner Contract (matching), a photo of the intended battery location, and the battery pricing calculator. More than one battery needs Paul Soltys' approval.

items.title: Combined packet complete
items.detail: Fully signed and dated combined packet -- Trinity POA (notarized), plus Utility, AHJ, State, and Disclosure documents signed and dated by the title holder / contract signer.

items.title: Special work flags
items.detail: Skirts, overhead/underground wiring, snow guards, and critter guards trigger Ops CPR action items automatically -- no rep document needed, but flag them if known.
